fields.safety_preconditions: Connector staging is allowed when explicitly authorized and validated. For core skill source parity sync payloads: maximum 4 skills per apply-in payload; minimum 2 skills per payload when more than one skill remains; do not fall below 2 skills unless only 1 skill remains naturally after successful prior batches or operator explicitly approves a one-skill test/retry. Validates ZIP contains apply_manifest.json, rejects ERROR TRUNCATED marker, decodes the written base64 back to a temp ZIP, verifies SHA256 round-trip equality, and reports workflow_dispatch payload path.

fields.trigger_conditions: Use when a DCOIR diagnostic, snapshot, evidence tool, or ad hoc/on-the-fly copy-paste terminal script needs to create an upload ZIP that is easier for ChatGPT to unzip, inspect, and parse. Trigger on upload-friendly ZIP, chatgpt-friendly ZIP, diagnostics ZIP, captured_files.json, zip_manifest.json, UTF-8 normalization, hidden/system metadata cleanup, wrapper-root cleanup, repeated terminal-log upload friction, or any script that produces files the operator will upload back into ChatGPT.
fields.input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT and DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR. Takes SourceFolder and OutputZip; optional NormalizeTextEncoding and IndexTitle.
fields.safety_preconditions: Packaging helper only. Avoids wrapper-root junk, skips hidden/system metadata, writes forward-slash archive paths, and can normalize staged text copies without modifying originals.
fields.launcher_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $repo=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine'); $out=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine'); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repo)) { throw 'DCOIR_REPO_ROOT is not set as a Windows System variable.' }; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($out)) { throw 'DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR is not set as a Windows System variable.' }; & (Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirChatGPTFriendlyZip.ps1') -SourceFolder (Join-Path $out 'some_diagnostic_folder') -OutputZip (Join-Path $out 'some_diagnostic_folder.chatgpt.zip') -NormalizeTextEncoding }"
fields.output_contract: Writes rootless ChatGPT-friendly ZIP with diagnostic_index.md, captured_files.json, and zip_manifest.json prioritized for fast triage.
fields.display_label: DCOIR ChatGPT-Friendly ZIP Builder | DCOIR-CHATGPT-FRIENDLY-ZIP

fields.notes: Active ChatGPT exec lane. Validated direct exec and apply-in-to-exec handoff. Exact learned sequence: create apply-in payload that writes one exec request JSON, verify chatgpt-apply-in report, verify exec request readback, then if no exec report appears because apply-in used [skip ci], use GitHub connector update_file on the already-created exec request JSON with a metadata-only restaged_at_utc update and non-[skip ci] commit message. Preserve the approved command and approved_command_preview exactly. Validated example: apply-20260503-exec-hashfix-validation-001 -> update_file on chatgpt_staging/exec_requests/exec-20260503-airtable-schema-hashfix-002.json -> restage commit 5fdfe97b6f4296de2048a6330a9f8fb76d2b4a5e -> exec run 25287957928. Hash-fallback validation passed: output_zip was non-null.
